name: @chbrain/khai-engine-mindset
description: khai engine content, the mindset domain: mindset as position, the persona's held theory of where ability comes from -- fixed and given, or grown through effort -- and the lens that theory becomes for challenge, effort, and failure.
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: Mindset as position: the persona's held theory of where ability comes from -- a fixed amount set early, or a capacity grown through effort -- the lens that colours every challenge, every effort spent, and every failure met.

card.wire: Attaches at Position. The anchor (position_mindset.md) declares mindset as a held theory of where ability comes from -- fixed and given, or grown through effort -- and the system-wide law makes every persona carry one beneath every challenge it meets.
card.issue: Two ready expressions a persona may hold: fixed (ability is a static amount, failure is a verdict on the person, effort is the tell of a low amount) and growth (ability is a capacity built through effort, failure is information, effort is the method). Each is a full position file the build composes onto the anchor, so the persona gets a theory that colours every challenge, not a label. More expressions slot in as sibling files without moving the anchor.
card.require: Two altitudes must hold. One, the law: declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter ('personas carry a mindset'), so the theory holds system-wide and no persona meets a challenge on neutral ground. Two, the link: each persona carries its mindset under Projection. A persona may also hold a different, even contradicting, theory under Shadow; the gap between the mindset shown and the mindset masked is the character, not a contradiction to reject.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; coherence is judged. The kit verifies the floor: the law is declared, and each persona carries a mindset under Projection. Whether a Projection mindset and a Shadow mindset cohere into a true persona is semantic, so it is taught and reviewed, never failed by the suite. The engine ships its own structural tests; the reading is guided, not gated.
card.setup: Two steps. Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the anchor. Then give each persona its mindset under Projection: one expression, which carries the anchor upward. Where a persona masks a different theory, put it under Shadow. Read it in what the persona reaches for or avoids, and how a setback gets narrated; the room reads the theory beneath the choices, never names it aloud.
